data.text/markdown:
dtour Demo: UMAP Tour of Immune Cell Markers

This notebook loads the Mair 2022 tumor dataset, embeds the 18 winsorized marker columns into 8D with UMAP, then runs a little tour through the embedding with points colored by FAUST cell-type label.
